name: Kuugo Sakamata
description: Gang Orca is the current No. 11 Pro Hero, dropping from his previous No. 10 place. He took part in the assault on All For One and the League of Villains at Kamino Ward, and later served as a makeshift villain during the Provisional Hero License Exam.

name: Kyouryuu
description: An unnamed dinosaur. When Kaede got drunk one night, she decided to let it live in her apartment where it now shares a room with her. It is really good at playing cards.

name: Mamika Kirameki
description: The protagonist of the magical girl anime series Magical Slayer Mamika. A supporter of the Military Uniform Princess, she doesn't like fighting and thus prefers to win over her enemies using negotiation. She can fly and use magical attacks. While not that dangerous in her original world, her attacks are deadly in the real world. This further weakens her will to fight, as she becomes afraid of her own destructive power. ~!She is killed by Altair.!~

name: Megumi Saitou
description: A girl that moves in with Yokoi after having been inspired by his work as a mangaka.

name: Minko Tsurugi
description: __Height:__ 165 cm (5'5") Minko is an apprentice chef and resident at Kissuisō. She has a very cold demeanor, often telling [Ohana](https://anilist.co/character/36184/Ohana-Matsumae) to 'die' following their first encounter, though when this is considered too harsh by [Ohana](https://anilist.co/character/36184/Ohana-Matsumae), she settles for calling her a balut instead. Though she is hard working, she becomes passive when being scolded for her mistakes and is usually victim to [Ohana](https://a

name: Mio Honda
description: **Height:** 161 cm **Hometown:** Chiba Prefecture, Japan Mio has a habit of nicknaming the people around her, much like the Futami Twins, and is the origin for Rin Shibuya being called Shiburin and Uzuki Shimamura being called Shimamu. She is considered to be the comedic one of the trio.

name: Mion
description: __Ability__: Cannon ~!To create illusions to fool others!~ She is the observer in the program.

name: Mira Kanou
description: Mira is a neuroscientist trapped in the borderlands. She first appears in Chapter 18 as one of the executives of The Beach where she is ranked No. 7 with Hearts as her specialty.

name: Miranda Lotto
description: __Height:__ 168 cm (5'6") __Nationality:__ German __Relatives:__ Unknown __Affiliation:__ Black Order (European branch) Cross Marian's unit __Weapon:__ Time Record Miranda Lotto is a 25-year-old German woman whose clock caused time to rewind in her town after she connected with Innocence inside it. She often feels inferior and useless and has been fired from over one hundred jobs. This contributes to her chronic depression. With the help of Allen and Lenalee, she became determined to be a useful

name: Mitsuo Yanagisawa
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5'10") He tried to escape from Kouko by secretly taking the entrance exams for a private law school in Tokyo. Just when he thought he was free of her at long last, she appeared out of nowhere, having found him out and secretly followed him to the same school.

name: Monaka
description: __Height:__ 134 cm (4'5") The true leader of the Warriors of Hope and the head of the "Mage" class. Her title when she attended Hope's Peak Elementary was Li'l Ultimate Homeroom (超小学生級の学活の時間 lit. Super Elementary School Level Homeroom Period). ~!Her last name is Towa, as she is actually from the powerful Towa family and is Haiji's younger half-sister.!~

name: Nagahiro Sakiguchi
description: Year 3, class A at Yubiwa Academy Middle School. Former student council president. Vice leader of the Pretty Boy Detective Club. He has a fiancée who is in the first grade of elementary school, so he has been ridiculed as a lolicon, but he denies it. He says, "I'm not a lolicon. It's just that my fiancée, whom my parents decided on their own, happens to be six years old." He has been the president of the student council for three consecutive years since his speech as the representative of the ne

name: Nanako Kuroi
description: __Height:__ 171 cm (5'7") Nanako is the homeroom teacher for Konata's class and her primary subject is world history. She thinks that students have it easy because as she has said, "you guys don't have to think about what to wear every day." She is more like a friend than their teacher as she has a lax personality. Consequently, she frequently borrows and exchanges video games with Konata, and is in Konata's guild in the same online game. Since she is not seeing anyone, she is constantly online,

name: Ootori-sama
description: These Gods of Birds look like giant ducks and are only shown in large groups. They love to bathe, as shown at Yubaba's Bath House for Spirits.

name: Purin
description: Purin is the main character of a famous anime in the world of NHK ni Youkoso! She is a Magical Girl who can transform into some objects, like a pudding or a little barrel. This character is important to NHK ni Youkoso because Yamazaki is in love with Purin, despite the fact that she is only a 2-D cartoon.

name: Rose
description: A leading member of the trade guild “Sparrowfeathers” that travels around the continent. Having traveled far and wide doing trade, she is a dual wielder and is perfectly capable of protecting herself with her daggers. She is carefree and optimistic, and goes at her own pace. She is very sociable, but has strong convictions and stands by them.
mediaTitles: Tales of Zestiria the X Season 2
searchTerms: Tales of Zestiria the X Season 2

name: Ryou Watari
description: A closeted trans man who can only express himself through his clothing. He's creative and artistic, but has trouble expressing it. Jin encourages him to be his partner on the creation of an apparel brand.

name: Sakura Hanazono
description: **Height:** 156 cm A good friend of Misaki's and one of the few female students at Seika High, Sakura is friendly and cheerful and, like the rest of the girls, relies on Misaki for protection from the wild behaviour of the boys. ~!She is quite popular amongst the boys, but frequently rejects their confessions; in particular, she’s rejected ex-rugby captain Masaru Gouda (剛田将, Gōda Masaru) one hundred times. According to Shizuko, Sakura falls in love without carefully considering what the pe

name: Su-Rim Jeong
description: Soorim was a nuisance at first to Hooni, but they became friends. He goes to a different school and is the popular kid there. He spends his free time playing video games and hanging out with Hooni.

name: Tsukumo
description: A fighter of the Second Ship's crew, and [Hirato](https://anilist.co/character/21426)'s subordinate. She is always wearing a serious expression on her face, is down to earth, and very dedicated. Tsukumo is a skilled acrobat and her beauty is complimented by both men and women. She is the most level-headed out of the group, and tries to be the shoulder to lean on even though she has a hard time understanding others emotions. Tsukumo is close to [Nai](https://anilist.co/character/16699), and cares

name: Yi Sima
description: Courtesy name Zhongda. As the acting head of the prestigious merchant clan, the Sima family, even in his teens Sima Yi was acknowledged by many prominent clan figures as a genius strategist, whose foresights and darings top almost all others of his time, and can be said to rival those of the most brilliant military tacticians, the Eight Enigmas.
